text_a: The vendor shall deliver all goods within 30 days of the order date.
text_b: The vendor may deliver goods within a reasonable timeframe following the order.

text_a: The customer must pay the invoice within 14 days of receipt.
text_b: The customer must pay the invoice within 14 days of receipt.

text_a: The contractor shall not subcontract any part of the work without prior written consent.
text_b: The contractor may subcontract any part of the work without restriction.

text_a: Liability is limited to direct damages not exceeding the contract value.
text_b: The party shall be liable for all damages including indirect, consequential and punitive losses.

text_a: Either party may terminate this agreement with 30 days written notice.
text_b: This agreement may be terminated by either party upon providing thirty (30) days advance written notification.

text_a: The confidentiality obligation shall survive termination of this agreement for a period of 5 years.
text_b: All confidentiality obligations cease upon termination of this agreement.

text_a: Disputes shall be resolved by arbitration in accordance with the rules of the ICC.
text_b: Any disputes arising from this contract shall be settled through binding arbitration under ICC rules.

text_a: The license granted herein is exclusive, worldwide, and irrevocable.
text_b: The license granted herein is non-exclusive and limited to the territory specified in Schedule A.

text_a: Payment shall be made in full prior to delivery.
text_b: Payment may be made in installments as agreed between the parties.

text_a: The agreement is governed by the laws of England and Wales.
text_b: This agreement is governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales.
